body: This PR adds and fixes opt tests for DataLayouts `similar`. In particular, `data = VF{S, Nv}(device_zeros(FT,Nv,Nf)); test_similar!(data)` fails on main and passes in this PR.
title: Add and fix DataLayouts `similar` opt test

body:
This PR changes inference failures from 351 -> 189 in `_SpectralElementGrid2D`.

The main problem here, I think, was that the compiler was boxing `CoordType2D`, so this PR moves that logic to a separate function (sometimes the compiler struggles with understanding types if a variable is computed in multiple places, even in the context of union-splitting).
title: Add inference test and improve inference of `_SpectralElementGrid2D`

body: This PR fixes the remaining inference failures in `_SpectralElementGrid2D`, which now passes `@test_opt`
title: Fix remaining inference failures in _SpectralElementGrid2D
